reading: Graph value-decodability generalizes to held-out object counts better than even a fair (zero-padded, per-entity) monolithic baseline. Pooling inflated the gap (0.35->0.17); residual permutation-equivariance advantage clears 0.15 across seeds. CAVEATS: representation-level only (linear value-probe, R2~0.56 modest); contact-prediction NOT better (criterion B failed); control-benefit (return under planning OOD) UNTESTED = the real next gate.
